report_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
rates = await fetch_conversion_rates()
report = {"report_id": report_id, "btc_usd_rate": rates['btc_usd'], "btc_eur_rate": rates['btc_eur'], "timestamp": datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat()}
reports[report_id] = report
